answers: Probability: mathematical study of random events. Foundation for statistics and machine learning.
Learning probability builds strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Probability is applied in many real-world fields. Understanding basics helps in any career.
Start with probability fundamentals, practice with examples, and apply to real problems.
